description: 7-node skewed chain tree. Minimise MaxDepth and SolutionLength via node reparenting.

reference_front.notes: Star topology: A,B,C,D,E,F all directly under root at depth=1. Minimum moves to reach depth=1.
After 1 move: root→A→B→C (depth 3), root→D,F (depth 1), root→D→E (depth 2). MaxDepth=3.

validation.pass_condition: The found front must include solutions corresponding to (MaxDepth=1,SL=3), (MaxDepth=3,SL=1), and (MaxDepth=5,SL=0) or strictly better on both objectives.

notes: Moving nodes to an intermediate ancestor (not root) can achieve the same or better MaxDepth in the same number of moves. The reference front lists the canonical root-attachment strategy; equivalent fronts are also acceptable.
